name: regulatory-legal
description: Watches regulatory feeds, diffs new rules against your policy library, tracks comment deadlines and open gaps, and writes the digest your team reads Monday morning.

interface.shortDescription: Watches regulatory feeds, diffs new rules against your policy library, tracks comment deadlines and open gaps, and writes the digest your t…
interface.longDescription: Watches regulatory feeds, diffs new rules against your policy library, tracks comment deadlines and open gaps, and writes the digest your team reads Monday morning. Migrated for Codex as a repo-scoped plugin. V1 supports local files and pasted text by default; remote connectors must be configured separately.
defaultPrompt: Use Regulatory Legal with local files or pasted text.
